items.definition_en: A very young child who cannot walk or talk yet.
items.example_en: The baby smiled at her mother.

items.definition_en: A male child or young person.
items.example_en: The boy played outside after school.

items.definition_en: A female child or young person.
items.example_en: The girl wore a red dress.

items.definition_en: An adult male human.
items.example_en: The man is waiting for a bus.

items.definition_en: An adult female human.
items.example_en: The woman is reading a book.

items.definition_en: A young human who is not yet an adult.
items.example_en: Every child likes to play games.

items.definition_en: A person who is fully grown.
items.example_en: An adult must buy tickets for the children.

items.definition_en: A person who is between thirteen and nineteen years old.
items.example_en: The teenager likes to listen to music.

items.definition_en: An old man or woman.
items.example_en: An elderly person may need help crossing the street.

items.definition_en: A person you do not know.
items.example_en: Never talk to a stranger.

items.definition_en: One of two children born at the same time.
items.example_en: My friend has a twin brother.

items.definition_en: A person you like and trust.
items.example_en: His friend came to visit him.

items.definition_en: A person who lives near you.
items.example_en: The neighbor always says hello.

items.definition_en: A person who shows clothes to others.
items.example_en: The model walked on the stage.

items.definition_en: A person who builds big muscles through exercise.
items.example_en: The bodybuilder trains every day.

items.definition_en: A man who has no hair on his head.
items.example_en: A bald man opened the door.

items.definition_en: A woman with light-colored hair.
items.example_en: The blonde woman smiled brightly.

items.definition_en: A young person who has small brown spots on the skin.
items.example_en: A child with freckles sat in the front row.

items.definition_en: A person who is higher than most others.
items.example_en: The tall person stood at the back.

items.definition_en: A person who is not very tall.
items.example_en: The short person needed help to reach the shelf.
